product: Dashboard visualization, pivot table, and authoring improvements
tagline: Dashboard subscriptions to Slack channels: Dashboard authors can now add Slack channels as subscribers to a scheduled dashboard refresh.
what_it_does: Dashboard subscriptions to Slack channels: Dashboard authors can now add Slack channels as subscribers to a scheduled dashboard refresh. Top N scroll bar behavior: The scroll bar on top N visualizations now appears only on mouseover for a cleaner interface. Legend placement options: You can now place legends at the top and left of visualizations in addition to existing placement options.
why_it_matters: Export to materialized view: Authors can now generate a materialized view from any dataset on their dashboard for improved performance and more efficient refresh and execution.
plain_summary: Dashboard subscriptions to Slack channels: Dashboard authors can now add Slack channels as subscribers to a scheduled dashboard refresh. Top N scroll bar behavior: The scroll bar on top N visualizations now appears only on mouseover for a cleaner interface.

capabilities.title: Authors can add links to
capabilities.desc: Authors can add links to text in pivot tables by specifying a URL path in the Actions tab of pivot table values.

capabilities.title: Pivot table header values are
capabilities.desc: Pivot table header values are now sticky and remain on screen while scrolling.

capabilities.title: Users can conditionally set the
capabilities.desc: Users can conditionally set the text color in pivot tables. Duplicative audit log events: Dashboards with companion Genie Spaces…

capabilities.title: Header height: Specifies the header
capabilities.desc: Header height: Specifies the header height in pixels. Header text wraps to fill the specified height. Overflow text is truncated.

key_takeaway: Dashboard subscriptions to Slack channels: Dashboard authors can now add Slack channels as subscribers to a scheduled dashboard refresh.
